answer:
PitchBook does not offer a free tier for its platform or developer API access [1][2][3]. There is no self-serve option for the API; access must be purchased as a paid add-on via a custom enterprise contract [4][1][2].

To obtain API access, you must contact a PitchBook account manager to discuss your requirements, receive a custom quote, and be issued an API key [5][2][3]. Once provisioned, the API is accessed via the endpoint https://api.pitchbook.com using an Authorization header with your assigned token [5]. Each request incurs a specific credit cost [5].
